chunks.en: Today I want to talk about the keyboard shortcuts I use every day.
chunks.ja: 今日は私が毎日使っているキーボードショートカットについて話したいです。

chunks.en: Copy and paste are the ones I use most at work.
chunks.ja: コピーと貼り付けは、仕事で一番よく使うものです。

chunks.en: I hit undo a lot when I make a small mistake.
chunks.ja: 小さなミスをしたとき、私は元に戻すをよく押します。

chunks.en: Switching between windows is much faster with a simple shortcut.
chunks.ja: 簡単なショートカットを使うと、ウィンドウの切り替えがずっと速くなります。

chunks.en: There are some shortcuts I keep forgetting, like the one for screenshots.
chunks.ja: スクリーンショットのものみたいに、なかなか覚えられないショートカットもあります。

chunks.en: So in the end, shortcuts save me a lot of time each day.
chunks.ja: だから結局、ショートカットは毎日たくさんの時間を節約してくれます。

outline: Wrap-up: some are hard to remember, but they save time

modelTalk.text: I use keyboard shortcuts every day, and they save me time. Copy and paste are the ones I use most. I press copy, then I press paste, and it's done. It's so much faster than typing again. When I make a mistake, I hit undo a lot. One quick key, and my mistake is gone. That feels really nice. I also like switching between windows with a shortcut. I don't need my mouse for that. It's faster, and my hands stay on the keys. But there are some shortcuts I keep forgetting. I learn them, and then I forget them the next day. So I write a few on a small note. Maybe I just need more practice. Little by little, they become easy. Now I use them without thinking. What shortcuts do you use most? Tell me, please.

chunks.en: Today I want to talk about the keyboard shortcuts I use every day at work.
chunks.ja: 今日は、仕事で毎日使っているキーボードショートカットについて話したいです。

chunks.en: The ones I use most are copy and paste, because I move text around all the time.
chunks.ja: 一番よく使うのはコピーと貼り付けで、いつも文字をあちこち動かしているからです。

chunks.en: I also hit undo a lot when I make a mistake in my code.
chunks.ja: コードでミスをしたとき、元に戻すもよく押します。

chunks.en: Switching between windows is much faster with a shortcut than using the mouse.
chunks.ja: ウィンドウの切り替えは、マウスを使うよりショートカットの方がずっと速いです。

chunks.en: There are still some shortcuts I keep forgetting, so I want to practice them more.
chunks.ja: それでもなかなか覚えられないショートカットがあるので、もっと練習したいです。

modelTalk.text: I use keyboard shortcuts every day, and they save me lots of time. Copy and paste are the ones I use most. I press copy, then I press paste, and it's so quick. When I make a mistake, I hit undo a lot. It fixes my error in one second, so I don't worry much. Switching between windows is faster with a shortcut too. I just hold two keys, and the next window pops up. My hands stay on the keyboard, so I don't reach for the mouse. But there are some shortcuts I keep forgetting. I learn them, I use them once, and then they slip away. So I write the tricky ones on a small note. Little by little, I remember more of them. Shortcuts feel hard at first, but they really help me work faster.
